overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a vehicle driving across a large cable-stayed bridge on a clear day. The camera approaches the bridge tower, passes beneath the cable stays, and continues across the span with no other traffic present.

scene_state.functional_zone: cable-stayed bridge approach with overhead signage

events.description: passes under overhead highway signs and continues onto the open bridge deck

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the multi-lane bridge approach toward the distant tower

entered.detail: large green directional signs mounted over the roadway indicating exits
tall concrete pylon with cable stays visible in the distance
grey concrete walls lining both sides of the bridge deck
dark angled barrier wall on the left side of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the vehicle approaching overhead highway signs on a clear day, then passing under them onto the open bridge deck. The cable-stayed bridge tower is visible ahead in the distance while concrete barriers line both sides of the empty multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: cable-stayed bridge deck approaching main tower

events.description: white cable stays become prominently visible as the vehicle nears the bridge tower

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive toward the bridge tower as the cable structure becomes more prominent

entered.detail: white steel cables fanning out from the tower, becoming visible against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving across the bridge as the cable-stayed tower grows larger ahead. White steel cables fan out from the tower and become prominent visual elements against the blue sky, while the noise barrier wall continues along the left side.

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the cable stays against the sky while passing the tower structure

agents.ego_description: driving past the bridge tower while the camera tilts up to view the cable architecture overhead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes directly alongside the massive bridge tower, with the camera tilting upward to capture the dramatic white cables against the bright sky. After passing the tower, the cables recede to the right side as the vehicle continues across the remaining bridge span.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across a vast cable-stayed bridge, transitioning from an open highway approach to a dramatic passage beneath a towering structural spire. It begins by passing under overhead highway signs and onto an empty multi-lane deck, with the distant bridge tower centered against a clear blue sky. As the vehicle advances, the tower grows in scale and the white steel cables fan out to become dominant visual elements above the concrete barriers. The camera then tilts upward to capture the massive scale of the tower as the vehicle passes directly alongside it, before the cables recede to the right as the road continues across the remaining span.
